## Timeline

> *Visual overview — delete this section if not needed.*

```mermaid
gantt
    title Project Timeline
    dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
    excludes weekends

    section Discovery
    Requirements     :done,    req,   2026-01-06, 5d
    Research         :active,  res,   after req,  3d

    section Development
    Implementation   :         impl,  after res,  10d
    Integration      :         int,   after impl, 3d

    section Launch
    Testing          :         test,  after int,  5d
    Release          :milestone, rel, after test, 0d
```

| Phase | Dates | Milestone |
|-------|-------|-----------|
| **Discovery** | [Start — End] | [Key output, e.g., "Requirements finalized"] |
| **Development** | [Start — End] | [Key output, e.g., "MVP ready for review"] |
| **Testing** | [Start — End] | [Key output, e.g., "QA sign-off"] |
| **Launch** | [Date] | [Key output, e.g., "Production release"] |
